blockers: PackageManifestV1 is not implemented yet; M2 is the first package-aware identity slice.
Airbyte-like structured sync contracts are not implemented yet; M4 is the first bounded it-stream hardening slice.

backend_passthrough_status.status: backend passthrough exists in embryo form

base_public_core_risk: Dependency and extras growth can enlarge Base bundle size if kernel changes are back-ported carelessly.
Metadata shape changes can break Base public-core compatibility wrappers.
Heavy profile defaults can unintentionally pull OCR, image, or PDF extras into Base.

expected_evidence: Form or FormKeysValues if locally supported
more complete coordinates and layout metadata

policy: preserve existing behavior as much as possible
do not turn on all heavy features by default

upgrade_risks: Wrapper surface now covers the planned enhanced partition parameter set.
Explicit metadata preservation guards cover the target enhanced fields.
CLI exposes the planned enhanced partition profile controls.
No benchmark evidence is frozen yet for Chinese invoice and contract samples.

collision_risks: Current artifact layout is rooted by sha256, so the same content processed under multiple profiles or strategies can collide.
Delivery payload does not distinguish artifact kinds with stable artifact IDs.
Destination replay can identify a run, but not a package graph with per-node outputs.
S3_package_manifest_gap.delivery_payload_compatibility_issue: DeliveryPayloadV1 points at artifact paths and summary evidence, but it cannot describe multiple package-scoped artifacts or stable node-level identities.

current_supported_concepts: ConnectorSpecV1 exists as a generic Zephyr connector field spec, not an Airbyte-like sync protocol.
airbyte-message-json subset currently accepts RECORD, STATE, and LOG messages.
Single-stream bounded message normalization exists in it-stream service.
Checkpoint and resume semantics exist for bounded cursor/token/page/state_dict progress kinds.
Existing bounded source lanes include http_json_cursor_v1, postgresql_incremental_v1, clickhouse_incremental_v1, kafka_partition_offset_v1, and mongodb_incremental_v1.
Current artifacts include records.jsonl, checkpoint.json, and logs.jsonl.
missing_concepts: ERROR support as a first-class message type
Multi-stream read catalog and selection semantics
must_wait_until_package_or_runtime_layer: Package-aware artifact identity across multi-node workflows
p2b_minimum_scope: Bounded ConnectorSpecV1 to DiscoverResultV1 to CatalogV1 contract line
Per-stream state and per-slice checkpoint model
Schema evolution and normalization planning hooks
Retry and recovery semantics aligned with current it-stream checkpoint ownership

clickhouse.current_behavior: Appends one row with identity key and payload_json.
clickhouse.future_mapping: package/artifact/element or chunk tables keyed by package_id and artifact_id

filesystem.current_behavior: Writes artifact directory rooted by sha256; does not emit DeliveryPayloadV1 externally.

kafka.current_behavior: Publishes DeliveryPayloadV1 JSON with key based on delivery identity.
kafka.future_mapping: key=package_id:artifact_id with package envelope or artifact event

loki.current_behavior: Pushes one payload JSON line with delivery labels.
loki.future_mapping: package event labels plus artifact event JSON log line

mongodb.current_behavior: Upserts one document keyed by delivery identity with nested payload.
mongodb.future_mapping: package and artifact documents keyed by package_id and artifact_id

opensearch.current_behavior: Indexes a document containing delivery_identity and nested payload.
opensearch.future_mapping: doc id = package_id:artifact_id or chunk id with package metadata

s3.current_behavior: Writes one DeliveryPayloadV1 JSON object keyed by idempotency key.
s3.future_mapping: prefix by package_id with manifest and artifact objects

sqlite.current_behavior: Upserts one row with payload_json keyed by delivery identity.
sqlite.future_mapping: package/artifact tables or compatibility wrapper over payload_json

weaviate.current_behavior: Indexes one object from result summary fields, not the full payload.
weaviate.future_mapping: chunk-level objects with package metadata and artifact lineage

webhook.current_behavior: POSTs DeliveryPayloadV1 to a single endpoint.
webhook.future_mapping: package envelope or artifact event webhook shape

risks.artifact_layout_compatibility: Package-aware artifact layouts can break Base-compatible path expectations unless wrapped.
risks.base_installer_runtime_packaging: Future package manifest and heavy dependency layers must remain optional so Base portable packaging stays bounded.
risks.base_runtime_size: Additional partition extras and future nodes can inflate Base runtime size and installer footprint.
risks.metadata_output_shape: Richer metadata can change normalized output shape and public-core serialization assumptions.
risks.profile_heavy_deps: Enhanced profiles can imply OCR, PDF, image, or layout extras that Base must not absorb automatically.
risks.public_core_export_surface: Core export APIs must remain bounded so Base does not start depending on P6K-only kernel layers.
risks.unstructured_02228_dependency_and_extras: Kernel upgrade work can pull heavier extras and native dependencies that Base must not inherit by default.
